purpose: Prevent a partial trading runtime or over-claimed adapter capability from being released as complete.

approvalRules.code-reviewer: Must report no unresolved correctness, safety, lifecycle, risk, portfolio, adapter capability, or test-gate findings before release.
approvalRules.architect: Must report no unresolved architecture boundary violations across SDK, adapter, account, execution, risk, portfolio, backtest, live, or strategy runtime layers.

releaseRules.score: Mandatory scope must reach 1000/1000 before claiming the platform complete.
releaseRules.capabilities: Every claimed adapter capability must have local fake-SDK, contract, or live-gated evidence. Unsupported capabilities must be explicit errors or documented unavailable extension providers.
releaseRules.reconciliation: No unresolved reconciliation discrepancy may be silently ignored; each release note must list remaining discrepancy policy limitations if any.
releaseRules.reports: Release notes must link verification output and benchmark evidence.
